I apologize, but I don't currently have access to the necessary tools to read or display image files. The tools available to me in this environment are limited to authentication (Gmail and Google Calendar).

To help you analyze the chart, could you either:
1. Share the image directly in this conversation (copy/paste or upload it), or
2. Provide a description of what the chart shows (the countries, time periods, and data values)

Once I can see the chart or get its details, I'll be able to identify which country shows the most dramatic drop in spirits consumption.
